parsed_review.summary: CP00-458 is a descriptor-only analytics-core pack (RP15.P03.M05.S07-S16, risk A, 10 units, "Permission And Audit Binding") and is internally consistent and within its declared boundaries. The registry binding (registry.js:86-101), CP458 requirements, manifest, baseline, closeout-pack-plan entry (closeout-pack-plan.json:409-524), and contract descriptor (analytics-core-contract.json:7614+) all agree on pack_id, risk class A, unit_count 10, range S07-S16, deliverable distribution {contract:2,implementation:3,test:3,hermes_evidence:1,claude_review:1}, upstream CP00-457, next CP00-459, and next subphase RP15.P03.M05.S17. service.js implements descriptor-only case set/descriptor with full no-write attestations (no runtime, no real data, no state writes, no audit/permission evaluation). validators.js enforces coverage, descriptor-only rows (descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false), authority boundaries, and contract/handoff alignment. model.test.js (3 CP458 tests) and validate-rp15-analytics-core-contract.mjs assert contract↔code deepEqual and import all 7 required public exports through index.js, verifying reachability. The pack-level production_ready claim is false (descriptor layer), so no unsupported production/enterprise-trust claim is made; the descriptor-verification flag is backed by implementation, tests, local validation, and deterministic Hermes evidence. Claude is held read-only and non-final-approver (claude_is_final_approval=false; promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false), and Hermes is used only for descriptor evidence packets (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Review-hardening evidence is valid: auth preflight passed with non-empty well-formed JSON, validation-report shows no forbidden tools and read-tools inspection mode, and changed-file-scope omits no active implementation files while correctly segregating unrelated dirty files. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present, which is the expected hardened sequencing before commit, not a defect. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
